rumor.detail: Camara selected for Guinea friendly matches vs Togo (Mar 27) and Benin (Mar 31)

newIntel.reasoning: New intel: International call-up for Guinea friendlies. Date (Mar 4, 2026) is after latest rumor (Jan 27, 2026). Confirms player activity and status post-Kotoko rejection of bids.

rumor.detail: Mngqithi linked with possible move to Amakhosi should coaching vacancy arise at Chiefs

newIntel.reasoning: New intel: Apr 1, 2026 article reporting fresh Chiefs interest contingent on vacancy. Date is after latest rumor (Apr 8, 2026 regarding 5-0 loss impact) but represents distinct reporting from Kick Off. Captures conditional nature of interest.

rumor.detail: 5-0 loss to Pirates has damaged credibility; Chiefs move now unlikely for next season

newIntel.reasoning: New intel: Apr 8, 2026 reporting shows significant shift—Chiefs opportunity has diminished due to poor performance. This represents material change in transfer likelihood and should be tracked as status deterioration.

needsReview.detail: Feb 17, 2026 article states agent Mike Makaab confirmed no approach from clubs; Apr 2026 Soccer Laduma states no formal contact from Pirates despite rumours
needsReview.reason: These findings contradict existing rumors (Feb 20 'verge of sealing', Apr 4 'preparing offer'). Sources suggest rumours may be speculative rather than substantive. Existing rumors should potentially be downgraded in reliability but no new intel to add.
